title: Sour Crisp Keto Anchovy Crumble
description: A show-off Italian dish featuring a unique blend of ground annatto and caramelize for an unconventional yet delicious keto-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Ground Annatto
ingredients.notes: Can be purchased pre-ground or ground fresh with a mortar and pestle

instructions: Coat a baking sheet with cooking spray or line it with parchment paper.
Season the anchovy fillets generously with salt and pepper. Arrange them on the prepared pan, making sure they are not touching each other for proper air circulation.
Caramelize ground annatto in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring frequently to prevent burning. Once golden brown, remove from heat and set aside.
In another bowl, mix together almond flour, coconut sugar (if using), cumin seeds, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Press the crumble mixture evenly onto each anchovy fillet on the baking sheet. The mixture should stick to the fillets but not be too wet for good adherence.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes or until the outside of the crumbles turns golden brown and crispy, watching carefully as they can burn quickly at this temperature.
Let rest for a couple of minutes before serving. Serve warm with your favorite dips like cream cheese or ranch dressing to enhance the flavor profile.
